name: Instagram content batch (30 posts)
description: Creates a full month of Instagram content: captions, image prompts, hashtags and posting schedule.

elicitation.question: What is the niche or industry?
Main content goal for this month?

steps.title: Define content strategy
steps.prompt_template: Define the content strategy for {brand} ({niche}). Tone: {tone}. Goal: {goal}.

steps.title: Generate 30 captions
steps.prompt_template: Write 30 Instagram captions for {brand}. 5 posts per content pillar. Language: {language}.

steps.title: Create image prompts
steps.prompt_template: Write an AI image generation prompt for each of the 30 posts.

command_template:
Create a complete month of Instagram content for {brand}, a {niche} brand.

Tone: {tone} | Goal: {goal} | Language: {language}

Using SKILL-CONTENT-SCALE, deliver:

1. Content strategy — 6 content pillars aligned with the goal: {goal}

2. 30 captions in {language} — 5 per pillar. Each with hook, body, CTA.

3. Image prompts — one per post, in English, photorealistic, bright, no text in image.

4. Posting calendar — 30 days with date, pillar, caption reference and best posting time.

5. Hashtag set — 30 tags organized by size (niche, mid, broad).
author: fluxrow
